text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, 41 PRs merged this week. A lot of infrastructure shifting and a fresh batch of models.

## Weekly Update - 2026-05-03

🏗️ **The Great Migration**
Text and image generation have officially moved to `gen.pollinations.ai`. The old `/api/generate/*` endpoints now 308-redirect to the new gen workers. It's the same API, just better plumbing under the hood.

🧠 **Models & Media**
- **Text:** Added GPT-5.5 and Llama 3.3 70B.
- **Audio:** AssemblyAI is now live for speech-to-text. Scribe stays free.
- **Video & Image:** Nova Reel finally supports seeds for video generation. Grok Imagine and Imagine Pro now support image-to-image (reference images). `gpt-image-2` also moved directly to OpenAI for better stability.

🔑 **BYOP & Auth**
- Added per-key `redirect_uri` allowlists for BYOP.
- You can now set unlimited BYOP budgets (use responsibly).
- `polli-cli` now accepts piped auth tokens.

🌸 **Ecosystem**
Pollinations is now an official provider in OpenClaw. Plus, four new community apps hit the showcase: StoryForge, Frieze, YSOAI, and LAHgen.

Keep building.
